name: Shadow Shield
text: Prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks if it has full HP.

name: Battle Sense
text: Once during your turn you may look at the top cards of your deck and keep one.

name: Energy Bloom
text: Move Grass Energy between your Pokémon as often as you like.

name: Hidden Door
text: Once during your turn you may switch this Pokémon with your Active Pokémon.
